property_address: 18 Weststand Apartments, Highbury Stadium Square, London, N5 1FG

rooms.name: Entrance Hallway
rooms.summary: Entrance hallway presenting to a good decorated standard throughout, with emulsioned white walls, oak-effect laminate flooring and dark grey carpet to the threshold at the front entrance. The space is largely unfurnished aside from a decorative doormat. Fixtures include an oak veneered front entrance door with security ironmongery, an internal oak veneered door, video entryphone, smoke alarm and light switches. Overall clean and sound with only minor wear noted to door frames and ironmongery close-ups.

rooms.name: Reception Kitchen
rooms.summary: Open-plan reception/kitchen in a modern apartment, presented unfurnished apart from a grey sofa, a dark-wood dining table with four black chairs and a black storage cube unit. The room benefits from full-height glazing with floor-to-ceiling vertical blinds and oak-effect flooring throughout. Décor is white emulsion with white gloss woodwork; overall condition is good with light wear noted to flooring joins, dining furniture and some kitchen fittings. Kitchen worktops, hob and sink require cleaning and several fridge/freezer drawer components are cracked.

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: Split-level bedroom over a mezzanine/staircase area, decorated in white emulsion with grey fitted carpet to the sleeping level and oak-effect solid wood flooring to the lower landing. The room is generally in good decorative order with a modern oak and glass balustraded staircase, a built-in double wardrobe and a double bed. Several defects were documented on close-up including chipped/flaking paint to a staircase stringer, damaged mortice lock keeps, marks to skirting and walls, and dirty/marked roller blinds requiring cleaning.

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: A compact en-suite/shower room finished in beige ceramic wall and floor tiling with a white emulsioned ceiling and recessed downlights. Sanitaryware comprises a wall-hung basin, close-coupled WC and corner shower enclosure with chrome towel radiator. Generally presents in good decorative order with light wear, though the basin shows crazing to the bowl, the skirting has a chip and there is limescale/tarnish to some chrome ware requiring cleaning.

rooms.name: En-suite Bathroom
rooms.summary: En-suite bathroom with fully tiled beige stone-effect walls, ceramic floor tiles and white emulsioned ceiling, presented in generally good decorated order. Sanitaryware comprises a wall-hung WC, wall-hung basin and panel bath with thermostatic shower over glass screen. A separate boiler/airing cupboard housing a wall-mounted boiler with manifold pipework and a black plastic storage unit adjoins. Chrome ware, notably the towel radiator, carries limescale scale and rust/debris deposits requiring attention; some minor scratches to walls and hinge rust noted.

rooms.name: Office Room
rooms.summary: Unfurnished office/bedroom with grey pile carpet, emulsioned white walls and full-height glazing dressed with vertical fabric blinds. Room is decorated to a good standard and presented clean to domestic standard, with a few localised defects noted to the door and door frame. Fixtures include a pendant light, thermostat, multiple sockets, smoke alarm and a ceiling loft/access hatch.
